title: RFP: Dynamics 365 CRM & Finance
raw:
RFP: Dynamics 365 CRM & Finance

Company: Northwind Retail
Submission deadline: 2026-04-22
Timeline: 6 months

Scope:
- Implement Dynamics 365 Sales and Customer Service
- Integrate with POS systems and ERP for order sync
- Migrate customer master and 3 years transactional history

Must-have:
- Omni-channel customer view, case management, API integration

Nice-to-have:
- Power BI dashboards

Evaluation Criteria:
- Fixed-price, experience in retail, local support

Compliance: GDPR, local procurement rules
